---
name: ✨ Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for BharatSeva Sahayak
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

**Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe.**
A clear and concise description of what the problem is. Ex. I'm always frustrated when [...]

**Describe the solution you'd like**
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

**Describe alternatives you've considered**
A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

**Additional context**
Add any other context or screenshots about the feature request here.

**Feature Category**
- [ ] New Government Scheme
- [ ] New Helpline Number
- [ ] New Document Checklist
- [ ] UI/UX Improvement
- [ ] Performance Optimization
- [ ] Accessibility Feature
- [ ] Translation/Localization
- [ ] Other (specify below)

**Target Users**
Who will benefit from this feature?
- [ ] Farmers
- [ ] Students
- [ ] Women
- [ ] Senior Citizens
- [ ] Business Owners
- [ ] General Public
- [ ] All Users

**Implementation Ideas**
If you have ideas on how to implement this feature, please share them here.

**Priority**
- [ ] Must have
- [ ] Should have
- [ ] Nice to have
- [ ] Future consideration

---
**Note:** We welcome contributions! If you're willing to implement this feature, please let us know in the comments.
